name: LoanRulesMCP
description: MCP server exposing loan policy rules. Agents call this to fetch up-to-date credit score thresholds, DTI limits, age policy, employment stability scores, loan products, and compliance requirements.

tools.name: get_credit_score_threshold
tools.description: Get the minimum credit score required for loan approval

returns.description: Minimum credit score for loan approval is 700. Above 750 is excellent.

tools.name: get_dti_policy
tools.description: Get the EMI-to-Income ratio policy limits

returns.description: Total EMI (existing + new) must not exceed 40% of monthly income.

tools.name: get_age_policy
tools.description: Get the eligible age range for loan applicants

returns.description: Applicants must be between 21 and 60 years of age.

tools.name: get_loan_products
tools.description: Get available loan products and their default terms

returns.fair_lending_policy: All decisions based solely on financial merit
